title: oldenlandia purpurea
intro: Oldenlandia purpurea, also known as Purple Milkwort or Hongjingtian, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia purpurea include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and improving immune function, as well as its potential to help with anti-tumor and anti-cancer effects. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia purpurea is often used in traditional Chinese medicine as a decoction or tea, and is also available in capsule or tablet form as a dietary supplement.
